pokemon:helioptile.name: Helioptile
pokemon:helioptile.summary: The frills on either side of its head have cells that generate electricity when exposed to sunlight.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: The frills on either side of its head have cells that generate electricity when exposed to sunlight.
They make their home in deserts. They can generate their energy from basking in the sun, so eating food is not a requirement.
The sun powers this Pokémon’s electricity generation. Interruption of that process stresses Helioptile to the point of weakness.
When spread, the frills on its head act like solar panels, generating the power behind this Pokémon’s electric moves.
They make their home in deserts. They can generate their energy from basking in the sun, so eating food is not a requirement.
The frills on either side of its head have cells that generate electricity when exposed to sunlight.

competitiveSummary: Competitive notes are pending a richer source import.
loreSummary: The frills on either side of its head have cells that generate electricity when exposed to sunlight.

pokemon:heliolisk.name: Heliolisk
pokemon:heliolisk.summary: It stimulates its muscles with electricity, boosting the strength in its legs and enabling it to run 100 yards in five seconds.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: It stimulates its muscles with electricity, boosting the strength in its legs and enabling it to run 100 yards in five seconds.
They flare their frills and generate energy. A single Heliolisk can generate sufficient electricity to power a skyscraper.
One Heliolisk basking in the sun with its frill outspread is all it would take to produce enough electricity to power a city.
A now-vanished desert culture treasured these Pokémon. Appropriately, when Heliolisk came to the Galar region, treasure came with them.
They flare their frills and generate energy. A single Heliolisk can generate sufficient electricity to power a skyscraper.
It stimulates its muscles with electricity, boosting the strength in its legs and enabling it to run 100 yards in five seconds.

competitiveSummary: Competitive notes are pending a richer source import.
loreSummary: It stimulates its muscles with electricity, boosting the strength in its legs and enabling it to run 100 yards in five seconds.
